page: Microsoft Azure DC4es_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the DCEV5 family. It is configured with 4 dedicated virtual CPUs powered by an Intel processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning it relies entirely on external storage solutions, though it is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are no integrated graphics processing units bundled with this configuration, and it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Due to the lack of benchmark data, performance characteristics must be evaluated based on the hardware profile. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention. Qualitatively, the instance offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads, small databases, or application servers that require dedicated compute resources but do not demand local high-speed storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DC4es_v5 is an x86_64 server instance from the DCEV5 family, featuring 4 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance external drives. With dedicated CPU allocation, the DC4es_v5 is designed for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without resource sharing. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, and small database deployments that do not require local NVMe drives or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC4es_v5 is a DCEV5 family server featuring 4 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage. It is designed for general-purpose and memory-optimized workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC4es_v5 is a DCEV5 instance with 4 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 16.0 GB RAM, and no local storage, running on Microsoft Hyper-V.
tagline: A dedicated four-core x86_64 virtual server with sixteen gigabytes of memory and premium external storage capabilities.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
16.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per vCPU)
No local storage included; Premium Storage capable
Zero bundled GPUs and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses
Suitable for general-purpose applications and small databases
